title: phyllanthus prieurianus var. glaber
intro: Phyllanthus prieurianus var. glaber, also known as the Naked Phyllanthus, is a plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat liver diseases, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant to protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus prieurianus var. glaber include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
